home.title: Build your own word stash
home.subtitle: Give your own meaning to words and share them with others. Create your own world of language.
home.feature1_desc: Search for words defined by others and discover new perspectives
home.feature2_desc: Give your own meaning to words and create a personal stash
home.feature3_desc: Like definitions you enjoy and share meanings

dashboard.subtitle: Create your own word stash.
dashboard.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this word?

word.add_desc: Enter the word you want to add to your stash.
word.public_desc: When set to public, other users can see this word and definition
word.definition_desc: Write a definition for the word.
word.definition_placeholder: e.g. A state of being happy and content
word.no_definitions: There are no definitions for this word yet.
word.delete_definition_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this definition?

feed.subtitle: Check the latest definitions from users you follow.
feed.empty: Your feed is empty. Try following other users!
feed.recommendedDescription: Discover popular definitions from the community while you build your feed.
feed.noRecommendations: No recommendations available yet. Check back later!

search.title: Search Word
search.no_results: No results found. Try searching for another word.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile information
settings.profile_info_desc: You can check your basic profile information
settings.email_desc: Google account email cannot be changed
settings.nickname_desc: You can change the nickname displayed to other users
settings.nickname_hint: Only 2-20 characters of English, Korean, numbers, and underscores (_) are allowed
